inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual in years, used to estimate maximum heart rate if not explicitly provided

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the individual in years, used to estimate maximum heart rate if not explicitly provided
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin yaşı (yıl olarak); açıkça belirtilmezse maksimum kalp atış hızını tahmin etmek için kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter der Person in Jahren, wird zur Schätzung der maximalen Herzfrequenz verwendet, falls nicht explizit angegeben
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'individu en années, utilisé pour estimer la fréquence cardiaque maximale si non fournie explicitement
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del individuo en años, utilizada para estimar la frecuencia cardíaca máxima si no se proporciona explícitamente

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate measured in the morning before any activity, in beats per minute

businessContext_i18n.en: Resting heart rate measured in the morning before any activity, in beats per minute
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabah herhangi bir aktiviteden önce ölçülen dinlenme kalp atış hızı (atım/dakika)
businessContext_i18n.de: Ruhepuls am Morgen vor jeder Aktivität, in Schlägen pro Minute
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque au repos mesurée le matin avant toute activité, en battements par minute
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca en reposo medida por la mañana antes de cualquier actividad, en latidos por minuto

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute; if set to 0, it is estimated as 220 minus age

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute; if set to 0, it is estimated as 220 minus age
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maksimum kalp atış hızı (atım/dakika); 0 girilirse 220 eksi yaş olarak tahmin edilir
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Herzfrequenz in Schlägen pro Minute; bei 0 wird sie als 220 minus Alter geschätzt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque maximale en battements par minute ; si réglée à 0, elle est estimée à 220 moins l'âge
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima en latidos por minuto; si se establece en 0, se estima como 220 menos la edad

inputs.label: Training Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Desired training intensity as a percentage of heart rate reserve (Karvonen method)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired training intensity as a percentage of heart rate reserve (Karvonen method)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalp atış hızı rezervinin yüzdesi olarak istenen antrenman yoğunluğu (Karvonen yöntemi)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Trainingsintensität als Prozentsatz der Herzfrequenzreserve (Karvonen-Methode)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité d'entraînement souhaitée en pourcentage de la réserve de fréquence cardiaque (méthode de Karvonen)
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad de entrenamiento deseada como porcentaje de la reserva de frecuencia cardíaca (método de Karvonen)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
